title: Indian Army_ Where a Unique Life Awaits You
subtitle: An inspiring webinar that highlighted the journey of Lt. Col. Arun Sharma and provided insights into life in the Indian Army. It emphasized career opportunities, selection processes, and the qualities required to serve with honor and discipline.
description:
Title of the event: Indian Army- Where a Unique Life Awaits You 
 Objective: The objective of this event was to bring the story of a brave soldier like Lt. Col Arun Sharma to everybody and inspire aspirants to explore the Indian Army as a career and understand how unique it is.The webinar informed us about the scope of pursuing life in the army. Lieutenant Colonel made it very clear that the army provides equal opportunities to both boys and girls. The webinar also gave us an insight about the uniform of the army, something that only the most devoted can afford, the badges and accommodations.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Inspire students to explore careers in the Indian Army.
Better understanding of army life and career prospects
